status: frozen before repeat1 replay database creation or prediction
classification: zero-model deterministic reproducibility repeat of the first V12 local retrieval/render replay on consumed LongMemEval-S dev42; not a score, fresh compiler run, untouched result, third-party result, or publishable claim
purpose: independently recreate the first frozen V12 local retrieval payloads from a second fresh V7 database clone and require exact latency-stripped canonical identity

content_review_policy.human_tuning_from_failures: allowed only as explicitly labeled consumed-development analysis and must remain generic

fixed_bindings.replay_control_schema_disclosure: The byte-frozen generic replay helper retains its historical v8-named output schema. Its operations and SHA are disclosed; the new run record supplies V12 lineage.

comparator.canonicalization: remove only retrieval.search_latency_ms; slice only retrieval.search_results for top20/top50; sorted compact UTF-8 JSON

namespace_rules.project_name: new repeat1 project name used only to isolate output files
namespace_rules.run_id: exact V7 producer run ID v7m42a1
namespace_rules.prediction_files: copy none and require zero before start
namespace_rules.risk: a new run ID selects empty database scopes; a project-name change alone does not isolate database state

runtime_guards.mutations: add, finalize, and delete rejected; no update or backfill route exists
runtime_guards.search_precondition: every registered current source in the requested scope has a complete or disclosed partial job under the exact V7 fingerprint
runtime_guards.predict_only_external_network: closed proxy on port 9 with localhost exempted; comparator is local and model-free

retrieval_and_harness.dataset: hash-pinned local dev42 materialization; no download

execution_rules: assert the repeat1 output root and every database/cache/ledger path are absent before execution
verify every frozen V12 source, V7 producer, harness, first-run freeze, first comparison, and comparator hash before copying anything
extract only the same frozen V12 source and pinned harness archive used by the first replay
clone the V7 database with SQLite backup and never mutate the V7 producer or first V12 replay
copy exactly the same 42 V7 ingestion checkpoints and zero prediction files
run one credential-free migration/readiness backend, checkpoint it, and bind post-migration database hash and counts
probe all 42 scopes for exact-fingerprint readiness before prediction
run one full all-42 predict-only replay with no selective retry
require database counts and checkpointed database hash unchanged across prediction and no compiler cache or usage sidecar
run prediction audit from the frozen V12 runtime source
freeze all 42 repeat predictions and 42 inherited checkpoints before comparison
run only the hash-pinned offline comparator against the first frozen V12 predictions
require 42 of 42 canonical payloads identical at top20, top50, and full, and require the repeat canonical aggregate hashes to equal the three precommitted first-run hashes
preserve any failed or superseded attempt rather than overwrite it

success_rule.prediction_phase: exactly 42 fresh prediction files, all cutoffs present, all audit gates true, database counts and checkpointed hash unchanged, and zero model/network calls
success_rule.permitted_label: V12 zero-model deterministic offline reproducibility repeat over reused V7 compiler artifacts on consumed LongMemEval-S dev42
cannot_establish: answer correctness or a benchmark percentage
